'''Intergalactic Droid Agency shuttles''' were used by the [[Intergalactic Droid Agency]] to transport [[Droid/Legends|droids]] to their new owners.

==Appearances==
*[[Droids (1986) 1|''Droids'' (1986) 1]] {{1st}}
*[[Droids (1986) 2|''Droids'' (1986) 2]]
